mapper.select: select id, code, name, channel, content_tpl, status from notification_templates order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into notification_templates(code, name, channel, title_tpl, content_tpl, status) values(#{code}, #{name}, #{channel}, #{name}, #{contentTpl}, #{status})
insert into notification_records(template_id, receiver, channel, send_status, created_at) values(#{templateId}, #{receiver}, #{channel}, #{sendStatus}, now())
